description_long: This is a two-story detached house with a combination of white-painted and red brick exterior walls. The roof is steeply pitched and covered with gray shingles, featuring a skylight on one side. The front facade is characterized by two prominent bay windows and a central entryway with a small gabled overhang. The windows are symmetrically arranged, with white frames and multiple panes, giving the house a traditional suburban appearance. The side and rear walls are simpler, with fewer windows and a mix of brick and white surfaces. The house sits on a paved area that could serve as a driveway or walkway.
description: A two-story suburban house with a mix of white and red brick walls, gray shingle roof, bay windows, and a central entryway.
description_view_0: This view shows the white-painted side of the house with several windows and a paved area in front.
description_view_1: This angle highlights the red brick facade, two bay windows, and the main entryway with a small gabled overhang.
description_view_2: The rear and side of the house are visible, dominated by red brick and featuring a secondary door and more windows.
description_view_3: This view returns to the white-painted side and the paved area, with the roof's skylight visible.
attribute_entryway_design: Central door with a small gabled overhang, flanked by bay windows, no porch or columns
